scripts.check: npm run check:client && npm run check:server
scripts.check:client: node --check client/src/auth.js && node --check client/src/api.js && node --check client/src/ui.js && node --check client/src/main.js && node --check client/src/world.js && node --check client/src/character.js && node --check client/src/combat.js && node --check client/src/inventory.js && node --check client/src/bank.js && node --check client/src/ge.js
scripts.check:server: node --check server/worker.js && node --check server/combat_engine.js && node --check server/ge_engine.js
scripts.audit: npm run audit:globals && npm run audit:todo && npm run audit:console
scripts.predeploy: npm run check && npm run audit
